title: centrosema vetulum
intro: Centrosema vetulum, also known as the sensitive plant, is a type of leguminous plant that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centrosema vetulum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating fever and respiratory issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and then steeping them in hot water or a solvent.
